channel.title: Trainers on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Trainers on Have an average day :|

item.title: New Internet Explorer 10 memory protection features not just for Internet Explorer
item.description: New Internet Explorer 10 memory protection features not just for Internet Explorer. This is pretty awesome, but it makes me wonder if games will employ this… and how much harder will it be to write trainers for them?
